name: itx-workshop-repro
description: A small, runnable reproduction that empirically tests the claims in the itx workshop against real Cloudflare workerd + real capnweb clients.

scripts.proof:swift: swiftc -typecheck dialog.swift && echo 'typecheck OK' && echo 'print((2...7).reduce(1, *))' | swift - && ITX_DIALOG_AUTODISMISS=Aurora swift dialog.swift
